summary: Regression smoke test (frontend-only) after Vercel deploy-config change (package.json engines node 20.x, removed packageManager hash; added repo-root vercel.json + .vercelignore). All 7 acceptance checks pass on public URL. No regressions.

verification_results.check: Home page (/) loads with all sections (Hero, About, Experience, Skills, Projects, Education, Contact, Footer)
verification_results.notes: All 8 sections render. No console/page errors. Dark theme intact.

verification_results.check: NO contact form; contact-details exists with email/phone/LinkedIn/GitHub/location
verification_results.notes: data-testid='contact-form' count=0; data-testid='contact-details' count=1. Body text contains '@', 'linkedin', 'github', 'phone', '+'.

verification_results.check: Hero & Nav resume dropdowns each show exactly 2 .docx options with valid hrefs
verification_results.notes: hero-resume-trigger and nav-resume-trigger each expose options 0 and 1 with .docx hrefs at customer-assets.emergentagent.com (AI_Business_Analyst.docx + AI_Data_Analyst.docx). Option 2 absent.
href='/project/cardiovascular-risk-prediction'; click navigates and casestudy-page is rendered.
href='/project/healthcare-operations-dashboard'; click navigates and casestudy-page is rendered.
Direct goto renders casestudy-page with H1 'Healthcare Operations Analytics Dashboard'. Screenshot captured.
#emergent-badge count=0; no anchor with 'Made with Emergent' text.

critical_code_review_comments: vercel.json / .vercelignore live at repo root (per request). package.json now pins node engine to 20.x and packageManager hash was removed -- aligns with Vercel build. No code regressions observed.
Static SPA routing works via deep-link, confirming Vercel rewrites won't be the only safety net during local preview (CRA dev server already handles fallback).
test_credentials: N/A — public static site, no auth.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Static frontend on https://portfolio-showcase-2828.preview.emergentagent.com. Routes '/' and '/project/:slug'. Selectors used: contact-form, contact-details, hero-resume-trigger, hero-resume-option-{0,1}, nav-resume-trigger, nav-resume-option-{0,1}, project-card-0, project-card-1, casestudy-page, contact-github, footer-github. Backend is a no-op stub; do not test backend.
rca of the issue: No issues. Deployment config change did not regress any acceptance criterion.
